approved_exception_note: Ownership note: lane-owned runtime edits are limited to `src/qual/context/**` and `src/qual/storage/**`. The only non-owned change is `tests/unit/test_context_storage_recovery.py`; `scripts/scope-check.sh` allows this exact file for `codex/feat-context-storage*` when `SCOPE_ALLOW_SHARED=1`, and the approved exception was recorded in `docs(context-storage): record approved test-file exception` (`5b30935c`). No shared-by-approval source files or integrator-locked files were edited.
